that a coded value is in the code system. If the operation is not called at the instance level, one of the parameters \"url\" or \"codeSystem\" must be provided. The operation returns a result (true / false), an error message, and the recommended display for the code.\n\nWhen invoking this operation, a client SHALL provide one (and only one) of the parameters (code+system, coding, or codeableConcept). Other parameters (including version and display) are optional."},{"name":"subsumes","definition":"https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/OperationDefinition/CodeSystem-it-subsumes"},{"name":"lookup","definition":"https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/OperationDefinition/CodeSystem-t-lookup"},{"name":"find-matches","definition":"https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/OperationDefinition/CodeSystem-it-find-matches"},{"name":"x-upload-external","definition":"https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/OperationDefinition/CodeSystem-t-x-upload-external","documentation":"SNOMED CT and LOINC can also be loaded by directly POSTing a ZIP file to this {"resourceType":"TerminologyCapabilities","meta":{"profile":["http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/TerminologyCapabilities"]},"text":{"div":"<div xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\"><h1>CSIRO Terminology Server (Ontoserver ®)</h1><table><tr><td>Publisher</td><td>Agence du Numérique en Santé (ANS), France</td></tr><tr><td>Version</td><td>6.25.3.1782882402308</td></tr><tr><td>Date</td><td>2026-07-01</td></tr></table><p>Ontoserver supports a large portion of the FHIR Terminology Services specification. In particular, it has native support for SNOMED CT, LOINC, and code systems defined via the FHIR CodeSystem resource. This extends to supporting use of all defined and default filters in a FHIR ValueSet, as well as the implicitly defined ValueSets for SNOMED CT and LOINC.</p><p>More details are available in the <a href=\"https://ontoserver.csiro.au/docs/6.25.3/api-fhir.html\">Ontoserver documentation</a></p></div>"},"url":"https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/metadata?mode=terminology","version":"6.25.3.1782882402308","name":"FHIR_Conformance_statement_for_Ontoserver","title":"FHIR
